title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at MT Educare Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at MT Educare Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MT Educare Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About MT Educare Global Group:
MT Educare Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
